example.title: Senior Business Analyst (Acting PM Owner)
example.subtitle: Leading client onboarding redesign
example.description: Spearheading backlog prioritisations, user journey maps, and success metric telemetry for the client onboarding experience.
achievements: Reduced onboarding friction by 22% through cohort SQL analysis and mapping layouts.
Adopted 14 product specifications directly into engineering scrum backlogs.

example.title: Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO)
example.subtitle: Scrum Alliance Credential
example.description: Completed training and agile credentials on product backlog management, user story drafting, and scrum ceremonies execution.
achievements: Passed certification under Scrum Alliance certified trainers.

example.title: Senior Business Analyst
example.subtitle: Data telemetry team lead
example.description: Designed business requirements models and query schemas to analyze customer dropoff activation rates.
achievements: Optimized queries, reducing telemetry data reporting latency by 95%.
Authored data-sync requirements adopted by engineering lead.

example.title: Product Management Foundations Course
example.subtitle: University of Maryland Curriculum
example.description: Studied customer discovery techniques, prototyping tools, MVP scope definition, and business model canvas frameworks.
achievements: Completed course, covering customer discovery and wireframing.

example.title: Associate Product Manager (APM)
example.subtitle: Target Career Milestone
example.description: Targeting full ownership of feature lifecycles, user cohort telemetry metrics, and release planning goals.
achievements: Goal: Lead feature lifecycle from discovery to GA launch.
